assertions.title: 播放中进度条显示填充区域: progress_bar_text(60000, Some(240000), 24) → 6 '#' and 18 '-'

steps.expected: test passes with 6 hashes and 18 dashes
steps.observed: test passed — verified hashes==6 and dashes==18

evidence.verifiedBehavior: progress_bar_text(60000, Some(240000), 24) produces exactly 6 '#' and 18 '-' characters
fmt_mmss(240000) returns '04:00', confirming footer would show '04:00' for a 4-minute song

assertions.title: paused=true → elapsed_ms stays consistent across calls

steps.expected: test passes — two calls with identical inputs produce identical output
steps.observed: test passed — bar1 == bar2 for same (120000, Some(240000), 24)

evidence.verifiedBehavior: progress_bar_text is a pure function; same inputs always produce same output, confirming paused state yields consistent elapsed_ms

steps.expected: test passes with 0 hashes, 24 dashes, fmt_mmss(0)=='00:00'

evidence.verifiedBehavior: progress_bar_text(0, None, 24) returns all dashes; fmt_mmss(0) returns '00:00'

assertions.title: progress_bar_text(300000, Some(240000), 24) → fill never exceeds width

steps.expected: test passes with hashes==24, dashes==0, total==24

evidence.verifiedBehavior: progress_bar_text(300000, Some(240000), 24) saturates at width (24 hashes, 0 dashes), elapsed > total is clamped

assertions.title: paused=true → time text contains '暂停' marker; paused=false → no marker

steps.expected: test passes — paused suffix contains '暂停', non-paused suffix does not
steps.observed: test passed — paused=true yields ' (暂停)' suffix, paused=false yields empty string

evidence.verifiedBehavior: paused=true produces '暂停' marker in time text; paused=false produces no marker

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. Tests are in src/ui/tui/widgets.rs. All tests ran successfully via cargo test with no failures.
